assessments.name: OPQ32r
assessments.description: The OPQ32r is a comprehensive personality assessment that measures 32 different personality scales, providing detailed insights into how candidates are likely to behave at work. It assesses communication style, leadership potential, teamwork orientation, and many other workplace behaviors.

assessments.name: General Ability Assessment (GSA)
assessments.description: The GSA assesses general mental ability and reasoning skills. It evaluates verbal reasoning, numerical reasoning, and abstract reasoning - core cognitive abilities important for most professional roles.

assessments.name: Java 8 Knowledge Test
assessments.description: Measures practical knowledge of Java 8 programming language, including syntax, core libraries, and common frameworks. Assesses understanding of OOP principles, functional programming features like streams and lambdas, and Java best practices for enterprise development.

assessments.name: 16PF Personality Inventory
assessments.description: The 16 Personality Factor Inventory provides in-depth personality assessment across 16 primary dimensions. Useful for understanding individual differences, predicting workplace behavior, team dynamics assessment, and identifying coaching and development opportunities.

assessments.name: CEB Verbal Reasoning
assessments.description: Assesses verbal reasoning ability - the capacity to understand written information, analyze arguments, and draw logical conclusions. Essential for roles requiring strong reading comprehension, communication, and analytical thinking with text-based information.

assessments.name: Leadership 7
assessments.description: Specifically designed to assess leadership potential and readiness across seven critical dimensions. Evaluates strategic thinking, decision-making under uncertainty, team development capability, influencing skills, and executive presence for leadership roles.

assessments.name: Advanced Python Assessment
assessments.description: Tests advanced Python programming knowledge including decorators, metaclasses, async programming, and design patterns. Covers data structures, algorithms, and Pythonic best practices. Suited for mid to senior Python developers in backend, data engineering, and ML roles.

assessments.name: React Frontend Assessment
assessments.description: Comprehensive evaluation of React.js expertise, including hooks, state management (Redux/Context), component lifecycle, JSX, and performance optimization. Measures ability to build modern, responsive web interfaces and single-page applications.

assessments.name: Data Science & Machine Learning
assessments.description: Evaluates proficiency in data science workflows, machine learning algorithms, statistical modeling, feature engineering, and data visualization using Python and common libraries (scikit-learn, pandas, numpy, matplotlib). Tests both theoretical understanding and practical implementation.

assessments.name: Verify Interactive - G+ (General Ability)
assessments.description: A modern, game-like interactive assessment of general cognitive ability suitable for all levels. Measures verbal, numerical, and inductive reasoning through engaging interactive tasks. Mobile-friendly and suitable for early-career and graduate hiring.
